name: Friends — New Friend Chat
tagline: Large open social chat for meeting new people
description: Friends (New Friend Chat) is a large public social group — about 23,000 members in July 2026 — where adults meet new people, from friendship through dating. It is broader than a pure hookup group, which also makes it more consistently active.
features: Adults meeting adults, friendship to dating
seoDescription: Large open social chat for meeting new people. Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
